commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a QA Lab scorecard taxonomy YAML fixture, parser/validator, coverage-report rendering, and focused tests tying existing QA scenario coverage to taxonomy.yaml smoke-ci/release profiles.

PR surface: Source +922, Tests +528, Other +561. Total +2011 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds report-only QA coverage taxonomy behavior rather than fixing a reported bug. The observable behavior is source-reviewable through the coverage report path and the author supplied terminal-style proof for the focused command.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer or mapping-owner confirmation of release-facing taxonomy semantics and proof scope, not a narrow automated code repair.

target.title: Add QA scorecard taxonomy validation
target.body:
## Summary

- Add an executable QA coverage/profile mapping layer over the authoritative `taxonomy.yaml` maturity taxonomy from #91512.
- Define stable executable category IDs from taxonomy surface/category refs and map existing `qa/scenarios/**` coverage IDs to those categories.
- Define only `smoke-ci` and `release` runnable profile membership in the checked-in YAML mapping fixture.
- Keep advisory compatibility as report-only metadata with no runnable profile membership.
- Validate missing coverage mappings, scenario/docs/code refs, invalid taxonomy/category/profile refs, release-blocking `release` membership, non-advisory rows without current runnable membership, advisory rows assigned to profiles, retired profile names, and accidental `--runner multipass` usage.
- Render the non-blocking executable mapping and validation warning shape in `openclaw qa coverage`.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts`
- `pnpm openclaw qa coverage --output /tmp/openclaw-qa-coverage-scorecard.md`
- `git diff --check`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: QA coverage inventory emits an executable scorecard mapping section layered on `taxonomy.yaml`, with checked-in `smoke-ci`/`release` profile membership and non-blocking validation warnings.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout on branch `dallin/coverage-taxonomy-validation` rebased onto current `origin/main`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts`; `pnpm openclaw qa coverage --output /tmp/openclaw-qa-coverage-scorecard.md`; `git diff --check`; `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`.
Evidence after fix: focused Vitest passed 11 tests; coverage report rendered `Maturity taxonomy: taxonomy.yaml`, `Maturity score snapshot: docs/maturity-scores.yaml`, `Profiles: 2`, `smoke-ci` and `release` profile sections, advisory compatibility as `profiles: none`, and `Validation warnings: 0`; final autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: `taxonomy.yaml` remains the maturity taxonomy source of truth, `qa/scorecard/stable-lts-taxonomy.yaml` provides executable QA joins/profile selectors, current profile terminology is limited to `smoke-ci`/`release`, and `openclaw/multipass` is represented as SDK-backed channel evidence on a host runner rather than `--runner multipass`.
What was not tested: full changed gate, release CI, live provider lanes, and future harness-neutral profile dispatch are not part of this scoped report-only foundation.
target.author: romneyda
